cases.query: use robomotion postgresql to query all active users
use robomotion postgresql to run SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = true
call robomotion postgresql to insert records into the orders table
insert data into a MySQL table
write a Python script to sort a list of numbers
create a bar chart from this sales data
connect to PostgreSQL and run SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = true

Includes connection parameters or references credentials
